tagline: Relaxing and care free pools are our business!

hero.headline: 75 Years of Pools Done Right
hero.subheadline: Since 1949, Pensacola families have trusted Aqua Pool & Patio to build, maintain, and renovate their pools. With 60+ professionals and two locations, we handle everything so you just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool & Patio Care<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From weekly cleaning to full construction, our 60+ professionals handle every aspect of pool and patio ownership so you can focus on relaxing.

cards.title: Pool Maintenance & Cleaning
cards.description: Weekly and bi-weekly cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment checks for residential and commercial pools. Your pool stays swim-ready year-round.

cards.title: Pool Renovations & Remodeling
cards.description: Resurfacing, tile replacement, deck upgrades, and modern equipment installations. We breathe new life into aging pools.

cards.title: New Pool Construction
cards.description: Custom in-ground pool design and construction tailored to your property, style, and budget. From blueprints to first splash.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Installation
cards.description: Custom-designed spas and hot tubs that complement your outdoor living space. Relax and unwind steps from your back door.

cards.title: Pool Chemicals & Equipment
cards.description: Full retail store stocked with chemicals, equipment, accessories, and replacement parts. We supply 90% of commercial pools in the area.

cards.title: Patio Design & Outdoor Living
cards.description: Custom patio construction, outdoor furniture, grills, and complete outdoor living solutions to transform your backyard.

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. We will visit your property, assess your pool, and provide an honest quote within 24 hours. No pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: Our Team Gets to Work
steps.description: Our tenured professionals — many with 20+ years of experience — arrive on schedule with everything needed. Cleaning, chemicals, repairs, or construction, we handle it all.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and worry-free. With 75+ years of expertise behind every visit, you can trust that your pool is in the best hands in Northwest Florida.

about.label: Why Pensacola Trusts Us
about.headline: 75 Years of Pool Expertise, Two Generations of Trust
about.description: Founded in 1949 as a chemical and bleach company, Aqua Pool & Patio has grown into Northwest Florida's premier full-service pool company. With two locations in Pensacola and Fort Walton Beach, a staff of 60+ professionals, and employees who have been with us for over 20 years, we bring unmatched expertise to every pool we touch.

features.title: 60+ Experienced Professionals
features.description: Our team includes long-tenured employees with 20+ years of hands-on pool experience. That depth of knowledge shows in every job.

features.title: Two Convenient Locations
features.description: Serving Pensacola and Fort Walton Beach with full-service shops, retail stores, and dedicated service teams across Northwest Florida.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with a service visit? We will come back and make it right at no extra charge. Your satisfaction is our 75-year tradition.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or adjust anytime — we work with you.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will return to make it right at no additional cost. We have been earning trust in Pensacola since 1949, and we are not about to stop now. Your pool deserves the best, and we guarantee it gets exactly that.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new residential clients are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For urgent situations like green pools or equipment failures, we offer expedited response. Call our Pensacola or Fort Walton Beach location and we will get you on the schedule fast.

faqs.question: Do you sell pool chemicals and equipment?
faqs.answer: Yes! We operate a full retail store with chemicals, pumps, filters, cleaners, and accessories for all pool types. We supply chemicals to 90% of commercial pools in the area, so you are getting the same professional-grade products our technicians use.

faqs.question: Can you renovate or remodel my existing pool?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We handle complete pool renovations including resurfacing, tile replacement, deck upgrades, equipment modernization, and aesthetic enhancements. Our construction team has decades of experience transforming outdated pools.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial pools?
faqs.answer: Yes, commercial pool service is one of our specialties. We maintain pools for hotels, apartments, community centers, and HOAs. We also supply chemicals to the vast majority of commercial pools across Northwest Florida.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Pensacola, Fort Walton Beach, and the greater Northwest Florida region from our two full-service locations. Whether you are on the coast or inland, our team covers your area with reliable, scheduled service.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: The pool cleaning service is just outstanding. Everyone is knowledgeable, very professional, and extremely friendly.

testimonials.name: Long-time Client
testimonials.text: Over 35 years, Aqua Pool and Patio Company is the pool expert in the Pensacola area. They have provided excellent service and sparkling pools.

testimonials.name: Local Homeowner
testimonials.text: The office staff and service department offer outstanding service with knowledgeable and professional personnel, along with fair pricing.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Practically Runs Itself?
contact.subtitle: Get a free consultation from Northwest Florida's most experienced pool company. 75+ years of expertise, two locations, and a team that treats your pool like their own.

footer.description: Northwest Florida's trusted pool experts since 1949. Two locations serving Pensacola and Fort Walton Beach.
